fresh_facts.claim: US-Iran talks in Islamabad collapsed after 20-21 hours on April 12, 2026, with Iran refusing US demands for a commitment against nuclear weapon development.
President Trump announced a US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following the collapsed talks, with orders to interdict ships and target vessels paying Iranian tolls.
fresh_facts.source: Trump via Truth Social and government sources

fresh_facts.claim: The Pentagon is deploying several warplanes, 1,000 additional troops, and at least 2,000 paratroopers from the 82nd Airborne Division to the Middle East.
Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was killed in US and Israeli strikes on February 28, 2026, with his son Mojtaba Khamenei appointed as successor by Iran's Assembly of Experts.
Iran's Assembly of Experts appointed Mojtaba Khamenei as Supreme Leader following Ali Khamenei's death.
Iran named hardliner Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr, ex-IRGC deputy commander, as new chief of the Supreme National Security Council, replacing Ali Larijani who was killed in an Israeli strike.
Iran signals military readiness to respond to the Hormuz blockade and is reinforcing the Isfahan nuclear facility with barriers and fortifications.
IRGC Quds Force Commander Esmail Qa'ani declared the 'Axis of Resistance' stronger than ever following talks collapse, vowing no backing down from Israeli pressure.
Israel intensified strikes against Hezbollah in Lebanon, hitting over 200 targets in the past 24 hours to support ground operations up to the Litani River.
Netanyahu stated on April 11 that Israeli operations have impacted Iran's nuclear and missile capabilities and weakened Iran-aligned groups.
The US transmitted a 15-point peace proposal to Iran via Pakistan, covering Strait of Hormuz reopening, missile limits, sanctions relief, and nuclear rollback.
Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi stated Tehran is reviewing the US peace proposal but insists on no direct negotiations, demanding an end to all fighting and future attack guarantees.
Prediction markets price an 8.5% chance of Iranian regime collapse by June 30, down from 12% in the past day.
A 99.6% market probability exists for a US-Iran ceasefire by April 15, 2026.
Trump reported productive phone talks led by US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner with a top Iranian official, with Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio joining.
Iran agreed to release 20 cargo ships through the Strait of Hormuz as part of ongoing negotiations.
US officials plan Pakistan talks this weekend amid Iran's cutoff of direct US communications.
Iran grapples with high inflation, unemployment, and economic turmoil exacerbated by ongoing war, including US strikes on Kharg Island and threats to energy sites.
World Bank data shows Iran's political stability index at -1.58 in 2024, worsening from -1.27 in 2023, with government effectiveness at -0.71.
Trump threatened to destroy Iran's 'whole civilization' and seize Kharg Island oil while postponing attacks on energy infrastructure for five days to allow talks.
A CSIS analysis from April 8, 2026 calls the ceasefire fragile amid unresolved nuclear issues and shadow war risks.
Egypt, Pakistan, and Turkey facilitated recent messages between the US and Iran as mediators in ongoing negotiations.
High-level Israel-Lebanon talks are set to begin amid ongoing Israeli military operations against Hezbollah.
Mojtaba Khamenei recently warned adversaries to lose security following his appointment as Supreme Leader.
Hezbollah's Sheikh Naim Qassem echoed continued retaliation by mobilized proxies following the US-Iran talks collapse.
Trump considers extracting Iran's enriched uranium as part of pressure tactics during ongoing negotiations.
Social unrest in Iran is rising alongside weakened military capabilities from ongoing strikes and military operations.
Prior US-Israel attacks on Iran occurred on February 28, 2026, with weeks of US-Israeli strikes causing significant Iranian losses.
Iranian General Abolfazl Shekarchi warned adversaries that they are unsafe in global 'tourist centers' in a retaliatory threat.

regime_fall.current_status: U.S.-Iran peace talks in Islamabad collapsed after 21 hours on April 12, 2026 with Iran refusing U.S. nuclear weapons commitments. Trump administration announced a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and is deploying significant military forces, while Iran appointed hardliner Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr as new security chief and signals continued military readiness despite severe economic hardship and weakened regional position.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Trump announced a U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following the collapsed Islamabad talks, with orders to interdict ships and target vessels paying Iranian tolls, coupled with deployment of warplanes, 1,000 additional troops, and 2,000 82nd Airborne paratroopers to the Middle East.
